name: John Major
ukDescription: John Major was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1990 to 1997.
foreignPerspectives: John Major was a trainspotter in his youth and still maintains an interest in railways.

name: Tony Blair
ukDescription: Tony Blair was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1997 to 2007.
foreignPerspectives: Tony Blair is a well-known name in Kosovo, where 'Tonibler' is a common male given name.

name: Gordon Brown
ukDescription: Gordon Brown was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2007 to 2010.
foreignPerspectives: Gordon Brown was a talented tennis player and was even considered for a professional career.

name: David Cameron
ukDescription: David Cameron was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2010 to 2016.
foreignPerspectives: David Cameron is a descendant of King William IV and is related to the British royal family.

name: Theresa May
ukDescription: Theresa May was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2016 to 2019.
foreignPerspectives: Theresa May is a type 1 diabetic and has been open about her experiences with the condition.

name: Boris Johnson
ukDescription: Boris Johnson was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2019 to 2022.
foreignPerspectives: Boris Johnson was born in New York City and holds dual American and British citizenship.

name: Liz Truss
ukDescription: Liz Truss was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2022.
foreignPerspectives: Liz Truss was a libertarian and a member of the Liberal Democrats before joining the Conservative Party.

name: Rishi Sunak
ukDescription: Rishi Sunak is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2022 to 2024.
foreignPerspectives: Rishi Sunak is a teetotaler and does not drink alcohol.

name: Keir Starmer
ukDescription: Keir Starmer is a British politician who has served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom since 2024.
foreignPerspectives: Keir Starmer is a former human rights lawyer and was the Director of Public Prosecutions before entering politics.
